transcript.text: Living in Lafayette, V-Log, the 7th of May, 2013.
Today was just an organizational day.
I thought I was going to help my mom move, but there was a misunderstanding with the
Carpet-gate dudes, and they weren't going to come until tomorrow.
So tomorrow's the day that we go in there to move all our stuff back in.
So today, I got a bit like 9.30.
Last night I felt a little bit, you know, how you feel after you exercise,
Especially when you're not in shape.
So I slept well.
I had some dreams, even enough to kind of remember them as I woke up,
But I know I'm going to start to remember more and more.
Yeah, so then I did all the things I was going to do, you know, organizational-wise.
I, you know, I glued another thing on top of my helmet, and then, you know,
Went out and tested and made sure I knew exactly how it works.
And so it points perfectly now.
And then I uploaded onto YouTube, and I did that little shaky thing where you fix the shaky,
And that makes it perfect for the video because, like, the way that it is without fixing the shaky thing,
It's just like, because it's really loose on the little, you snap it on, and then it, like, jatters, you know,
So it's like you can't see anything, but when you hit the shaky, it makes it perfect, so it's great.
And I record sound, too, but I don't think I'll be doing any of that.
Yeah, I'm just going to carry that around with me everywhere I go, and with extra batteries.
I just turn it on and record the whole thing.
And then what did I do?
I put a new chain on my mountain bikes, and I thought the mountain bike's good.
And then I organized my stuff, which is hard to vlog about because you don't really know what you did.
But I did have a lot of organization to do.
I was all unorganized and couldn't find anything yesterday, and so I did a lot of organization.
And I'm not done. I need to do that tomorrow.
I want to organize my car to have pretty much all my stuff stored in my car so that I can drive up in the mountains,
And then I'll just be ready to go, you know.
And then time went on, and then I wanted to patch up the hole in my bike bag.
So I went to sew it up, and I couldn't find the needle, so I had to drive down to the store at Walmart and get the needle.
Then I came home, and I fixed it, and I needled it, you know, and sewed it all together.
It took me a couple of hours to sew it, but I'm glad because now it's, like, bummer.
I really like that bag. It was a purple one. I like the design and everything.
So, yeah, I think it'll be all right. I sewed it really tough, and if it busts any other holes, I'll just sew that up.
But then I found I didn't have to get the needle because then I looked down, and when I took my string out,
Like, the needle fell out and it fell on the ground.
I hate when I have to go on errands when I don't have to because then I spend money on gas and time and all that, but whatever.
I was busy all day. And then I went to go on the AVS video editing program, which I really like.
It's so, like, you know, intuitive. It's great. Way better than Premiere.
I had Premiere a few years ago, and then I lost the disc, and I guess it was only $100 a few years ago.
Now they want, like, $800 for it. So, anyway, this thing, I think, has all I'll ever need.
So, I want to keep my videos simple, but tonight, I'm just, I mean, it's, like, 10 o'clock at night now.
I should be in bed, but I don't have to be at my mom's until 3 tomorrow.
So, I'm just going to sleep in tomorrow and then do my organizational stuff in the morning,
And then we'll go in and help my mom and then come back.
So, but, yeah, I'm just fired up right now to figure out the whole video to get a real thing
And get a battle plan going for my bike videos so that next time I film something,
I come back and I know what to film, and I can do, like, a cool video on every bike ride I do,
On every cool, like, bike section I do, on every bike ride I do.
So, yeah, I'm really fired up about that.
Oh, but for, like, two hours during the day, I was talking to somebody on the phone.
So, while I was talking to them, I was just condensing my Kendall e-book page,
Which, you know, who knows how many more hours.
The problem is I have 790 books on there, and each book has, like, you know,
Maybe an average of 30 chapters, and some books have, like, hundreds of chapters, you know.
So, I have no idea.
And a lot of those, they're double-spaced because I couldn't tell when I was dragging them on there
Because on Dreamweaver it all looks single-spaced.
So, I just have to take all these tags out and, you know, the breaker and the paragraph tags.
But, anyways, I'm not stuck like I was before just doing that.
Now I can do it on the bike.
I didn't ride the bike on the rollers today, though, because I was just talking to somebody
And then, yeah, organizing and stuff.
So, tomorrow's another organizing day.
It's just another organizing day.
But I will get my shit together.
It's only a matter of time.
And then, of course, I need to start working soon.
But my mom is paying me, so that's going to bring me back some money.
I can deposit that and pay off some of my credit cards, which I recruit more debts on.
So, anyways, I shouldn't talk about that.
People think I'm bitching about money when I mention that stuff.
But, hey, I'm a transparentist.
I explain everything.
Oh, yeah.
And I also decided on my V-Logs, every day I do a flex because I notice, like, when I first did the dumbbells,
The next day I looked really good because all my muscles were all tight and, like, trying to, you know,
They were like, what the fuck, and they're all like this, you know, which made me look good.
But then the next day, after they had, like, recovered and everything, I was totally flabby and I looked worse again.
I was like, oh, but I don't look good anymore.
So, anyways, as part of my daily V-Log, I'm going to do daily flex because that's, you know,
That's, like, ultimate transparency.
How are you doing?
Well, I don't know.
You tell me how I'm doing.
Check it out.
See how I have, like, the fucking droopy titty there?
That's what I need to get rid of.
But it's all about fat.
Like, that's where I store my fat.
I store my fat there and there.
So, you know, some people store the fat in different places, like my wife or my ex-wife.
She'd store her fat.
She called me today, by the way.
Uh, she stores her fat here, but not in her butt, which is cool for chicks.
Anyways.
Alright.
Daily V-Log.
Peace out.
